comments.body: STATUS 2026-07-12 (/rebar-implement): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED locally as 0fb8d17e6 on branch epic/9d50-calibration-followup (worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-epic-9d50), part of an 8-commit stack. Locally green: pre-commit make lint + make typecheck passed; code leaves validated under held-out TDD (RED-first, implementer held out from the edge oracle, restored full oracle green, mutation/teeth check). NOT yet pushed to Gerrit and NOT closed. REMAINING: push the stack to gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main, get LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1, then transition ac0e-dbfd-eeb7-4b53 in_progress closed (completion-verifier close gate runs). Do NOT close before this change's Gerrit Verified +1 (per CLAUDE.local.md).

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Epic bf50's AC read 'all child stories closed (signed)', which converted the completion gate's deliberate certifiable:false soft path (PASS-but-unsigned parent) into a hard FAIL when one child (5f39) was legitimately force-closed pending operator attestation — forcing a second unsigned force-close and erasing certification signal for a fully-landed 19-story epic (the contagion in bug 02a3). The structural fix is 02a3; this task documents the authoring rule so the anti-pattern stops being written.

## What
- Add the rule to the ticket-template guidance in CLAUDE.md (the 'Ticket template the gates enforce' section) and docs/plan-review-gate.md or docs/llm-framework.md wherever epic AC authoring is described: epic/story ACs should state the OUTCOME (children closed; work landed) — never 'closed (signed)' / signature demands, because signature status is the gate's own output and restating it as a criterion defeats the certifiable:false escape hatch (ADR 0043 / the close-gate design).
- Cross-reference bug 02a3 and the bf50/5f39 incident as the motivating case.
- Optional (judgment): a P-tier DET lint in the plan-review floor warning on 'signed' inside an AC checklist line of a container ticket — only if it fits an existing DET seam cleanly; otherwise docs-only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md's ticket-template section and the relevant docs page state the no-signature-demands-in-ACs rule with the rationale and the 02a3 cross-reference.
- [ ] make lint passes on the change.
- [ ] make test passes on the change.

file_impact.reason: document the no-signature-demands-in-ACs authoring rule in the ticket-template section
document the same rule + bug 02a3 cross-reference in the close-gate section

compiled_state.title: Document the epic AC-authoring rule: never demand child SIGNATURES in acceptance criteria
